title: Quantity
description: Common v1 quantity placeholder for future API and event contracts.
$comment: TODO: Phase 1 source documents do not define unit catalogs, precision, or conversion policy. Fields are intentionally minimal until product/ops sources define concrete units.

value.description: Quantity value represented as a string to avoid precision loss. TODO: define numeric format from a source document.

unit.description: Unit code or label. TODO: define the allowed unit set from product/ops source documents.
